The Friday Note — Issue #7

The New Middlemen

March 27, 2026 • The Future of PMM

Welcome

This week I've been thinking about middlemen.

Not the old kind — the distributors, the resellers, the channel partners. The new kind. The ones that showed up this week all at once, without asking.

Google AI Mode crossed 75 million daily active users and started testing shopping ads inside the conversational interface. Meta embedded Manus — its $2B AI acquisition — into Ads Manager for 4 million+ advertisers. OpenAI rolled ChatGPT ads to every free and Go user. And maybe the biggest move: OpenAI and Amazon announced a $50B strategic partnership that Forrester says may have just won consumer agentic commerce.

Three platforms. Same week. Same move: inserting an AI layer between your product and your buyer.

This week: why the real story isn't ads — it's the full-stack connection from ERP to AI checkout.

—Chris

🔥 Deep Dive

The Full-Stack Buyer: From ERP to AI Checkout

For 20 years, the buyer's journey had a clean separation: marketing owned awareness, sales owned the deal, and the ERP handled fulfillment. That separation is collapsing. And the companies that understand why are about to have an enormous advantage.

🏗️ The New Commerce Stack

Agents Are Connecting the Full Stack

🧠 AI Discovery — ChatGPT, Google AI Mode, Perplexity

↕ UCP (Universal Commerce Protocol)

🛒 Agentic Checkout — "Buy it in ChatGPT," Google AI Mode Shopping

↕ MCP / A2A (Agent Protocols)

📦 Commerce Cloud — Shopify, Salesforce, SAP Commerce

↕ Native ERP Integration

🏭 ERP Backend — SAP, Oracle Fusion, Microsoft Dynamics

Read the Full Analysis →

From the top down: Shopify and Google co-developed UCP — an open standard that lets AI agents browse catalogs, build carts, and complete checkout. Walmart, Target, Wayfair, Etsy already on board.

From the bottom up: SAP announced MCP servers for Commerce Cloud. Oracle has 1,000+ AI agents across Fusion apps. Microsoft's Dynamics 365 Commerce MCP Server exposes catalog, pricing, inventory, and fulfillment.

The bridge: OpenAI + Amazon's $50B deal creates persistent-memory agents that move across software systems. The first end-to-end agentic commerce pipeline at scale.

🚀 Case Study

OpenAI + Amazon: The $50B Bet

On February 27, Amazon invested $50 billion in OpenAI — the largest AI deal in history. But the commerce implications have been underreported.

📚 Forrester Analysis

"Power Couple OpenAI + Amazon May Have Just Won Consumer Agentic Commerce"

Forrester's thesis: the most popular answer engine (ChatGPT) + the most popular product search engine (Amazon) may dominate the most popular search engine (Google).

Read Forrester's analysis →

The PMM angle: If your product is sold through Amazon, your listing just became AI-discoverable in a fundamentally new way. If you compete with Amazon-listed products, the competitive landscape just shifted. Structured product data and machine-readable positioning aren't optional anymore.

📊 Chart of the Week

The Agentic Commerce Explosion

📈 DATA

Consumers Using AI in Their Buying Journey

2023
~8%
2024
~15%
Jan 2026
45%
2030 (est.)
~50% via agents

Sources: IBM, Morgan Stanley, PYMNTS

McKinsey estimates agentic commerce could redirect $3–5 trillion in global retail spend by 2030. Traffic from AI sources to retail sites has surged 1,200% — while traditional search traffic declined 10%.

📰 News Roundup

What Happened This Week

OpenAI

ChatGPT ads expand to all free and Go users →

Retail dominates early inventory. Truist: <$1B this year → $30B by 2030.

Meta

Manus AI live in Ads Manager for 4M+ advertisers →

$2B acquisition → 7-week integration. Fastest ever at Meta.

Shopify + Google

Universal Commerce Protocol gains momentum →

Walmart, Target, Wayfair, Etsy on board. Agentic checkout rolling to AI Mode.

Gartner

AI skills mandatory for marketers by 2027 →

Plus: $58B productivity shift predicted. Rising +1,200% in our trend tracking.

Zalando

Stock surges 12% on AI content economics →

AI-generated images produce 70% more content at same cost. Best trading day in 2 years.

Alibaba

Wukong enterprise AI platform launches →

Multi-agent platform for docs, approvals, research. Agent paradigm goes global.

Updated

Competitive Intelligence Dashboard

🔍 Key Updates (March 25)

Amazon: $50B OpenAI deal. Rufus + ChatGPT. Agentic commerce leader.

Shopify: UCP co-developed with Google. Infrastructure play confirmed.

Salesforce: "Agentforce Marketing" rebrand. $1.8B Data Cloud ARR.

Meta: Manus AI in Ads Manager. Fastest integration ever.

SAP: MCP servers for Commerce Cloud (Q2). ERP-to-agent pipeline.
